# Information Warfare Techniques

**Technique 1: Amplify Outrage. The most emotional content gets the most engagement.**

**Technique 2: Create False Consensus. Bots and fake accounts make lies seem popular.**

**Technique 3: Hijack Hashtags. Turn a protest hashtag into a platform for counter-messages.**

**Case: The #MacronLeaks. Hacked emails were released hours before the French election.**

**Case: The #BlackLivesMatter. Activists used Twitter to organize protests and spread messages.**

**Case: The #MAGA. Trump supporters used hashtags to build a movement.**

**Case: The Fake Persona. Russian trolls created entire fake personalities to infiltrate US activist groups.**
**Case: The Coordinated Inauthentic Behavior. Networks of fake accounts working together to amplify messages.**
**Case: The Hashtag Poisoning. Using a hashtag to spread the opposite message.**
**Case: The Meme Warfare. Memes spread ideas faster than text. They are hard to counter.**
**Case: The Sock Puppet. A fake online identity used to deceive. Sock puppets are everywhere.**
**Case: The Bot Detection. Platforms use AI to detect bots. The bots evolve to evade detection.**
**Case: The Amplification. Coordinated networks amplify each other's posts.**
**Case: The Astroturf. Fake grassroots movements created by bots and paid accounts.**
